name: Summer Idol

pvs.author: AmeSubs
pvs.description:
a story of (trying to) find love on the beach. because, it's summer.

yeah so I love oster project and also niboshi's illusts. truly a match made in heaven.
but honestly. i don't even know what len's doing.
and admit it, how many of you have a mom like meiko? miku has awakened a demon.

AUTHOR COMMENT:
It's summer~! It's swimsuits~! Rock 'n Roll!
